name: Grilled Pork Skewers with Ginger (Gr)
recipeIngredient: red bell peppers - cut into 1 1/2 inch x 3/4 inch strips
red sweet onions - cut into 1 1/2 inch x 3/4 inch x 1/2 inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all marinade ingredients well.
2. Cut the pork butt into 1-inch cubes and marinate, covered in the refrigerator for 4 hours.
3. Remove the meat from the marinade. Discard the remaining marinade.
4. Thread the pork, red pepper, and onion onto skewers. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
5. Grill over medium heat for 5 minutes on each side.
Yield: 4 servings
